utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 items appear in the final package. Now verify completeness: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – complete. 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided (July 1st to July 5th, 2024) – complete. 3) transportation: 'Budget Airlines, Economy Class (Estimated Cost: €400)' – has cost but lacks flight details (airline name, flight numbers/times) per 'flight details with costs'; thus not fully specified. 4) accommodation: 'Historic Lodge (5 nights, Estimated Cost: €525)' – has selection and cost; acceptable though not a named hotel with address, but meets 'hotel selection with costs' minimally. 5) activities: list with names and costs – complete. 6) additional_services: 'None' – acceptable. 7) total_budget: '€1700' plus separate cost_breakdown object – complete. Therefore, 6 of 7 are fully specified; transportation is insufficiently detailed.
